## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Spec Kit

- [ ] This change has a corresponding spec/design (or links one)
- [ ] This change follows `.specify/memory/constitution.md`
- [ ] This is a trivial/docs-only change and does not require a full spec

## MCP Contract Impact

- [ ] Tool input changed
- [ ] Tool output changed
- [ ] Warning/error behavior changed
- [ ] Pagination/cursor behavior changed
- [ ] No public MCP contract impact

## OpenGrok Semantics

- [ ] Does not claim unsupported OpenGrok capability
- [ ] Best-effort / truncated / heuristic / page-local behavior is documented

## Verification

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
